channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: EU to discuss potential restrictions on Chinese imports amid fears of overreliance - The Guardian
WHO chief heads to ‘hardest hit’ Ituri as DRC’s 17th Ebola outbreak spreads - Al Jazeera
Olivia Rodrigo reacts to babydoll dress criticism, says it shows how we 'normalize pedophilia in our culture' - Entertainment Weekly
French Open: Where Jannik Sinner's second-round loss ranks among the biggest sports upsets - Yahoo Sports
Trump refiles defamation suit against Wall Street Journal over Epstein story - Politico
Pakistan’s changing Middle East approach and the question of national interest - Arab News PK
China tungsten exports to Japan halve amid tightened controls - Nikkei Asia
What to know about Louisiana's effort to redraw congressional districts before the midterm elections - The Washington Post
Springsteen taunts White House in D.C. concert — and promises more pre-election ‘ruckus’ - The Washington Post
Average US long-term mortgage rate climbs to 6.53%, highest level in nine months - The Washington Post
US, Iran accuse each other of violating truce after attacks - France 24
Gaza City hospitals say several killed in strike, as Israel targets Hamas leaders - BBC
Stellantis announces second JV with Dongfeng as Jeep, Peugeot go to China - WardsAuto
Robert Pattinson's 5 2026 Movies Set A New Record For The Actor - ScreenRant
Who, Where, How, and Why to Watch the World Cup Action This Weekend - Mountain Bike Action
Italy busts money-laundering ring tied to mafia boss Messina Denaro - The Straits Times
Verstappen and Sainz urge FIA “to be tough”, but F1 manufacturers must look in the mirror - Autosport
Oil advances, stocks drift on fresh US-Iran strikes - Yahoo Finance Singapore
How Dubai’s pop culture communities are creating spaces for connections, opportunities during uncertain times - Gulf News
Sui blockchain suffers another network outage as transactions grind to a halt - CoinDesk
Court lets Trump’s executive order limiting mail-in voting stand, for now - The Washington Post
I added one extra question to my ChatGPT prompts — and the answers instantly became more useful - TechRadar
A $2,000 AI-generated film will make its debut at Tribeca - The Verge
French Open: Jannik Sinner upset by Juan Manuel Cerundolo after being granted controversial cramping timeout - Yahoo Sports
Long-term interest rates seen easing after Middle East-driven surge - Khaleej Times
War in the Middle East has forced U.S. farmers to adapt - marketplace.org
Fraser and Carter fifties, Gordon three-for help Scotland ease past Netherlands - ESPNcricinfo
S&P 500, Nasdaq gain on report of Middle East peace deal progress - Reuters
Image of Thai police in sparkly dresses with handcuffed suspect turns out to be AI fake - The Guardian
We Broke Nicolas Cage With Magic | Interview With A Magician - Complex
Worldwide, a quarter of new car sales are electric vehicles or hybrids - Pew Research Center
South China Sea Threatens Hong Kong Trade – OpEd - Eurasia Review
Celebrity Photos Updated Daily: Jennifer Lopez, Jean Smart, Kaitlin Olson and More - People.com
Mikel Arteta new contract: Arsenal owners optimistic of tying manager to new deal after Premier League win - Sky Sports
What Would Relations with Post-War Russia Look Like? - War on the Rocks

'Sidemen Presents: Sidemenu', the latest series from KSI's creator collective, will have an innovative launch strategy on YouTube and Prime Video. Read more below. - facebook.com
BBC's Question Time to feature an AI panel made up of Gandhi, Frida Kahlo, Che Guevara and Emmeline Pankhurst - Radio Times

Coming Soon to a Roblox Game Near You: Strange AI-Generated Machines and Creatures - CNET
Dana White scoffs at UFC fighter pay compared to WNBA players making $270K minimum: ‘That’s ridiculous’ - MMA Fighting
Knicks donating hundreds of NBA Finals tickets to underprivileged fans in city - NBC Sports
Call of controversy? Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 imagines a revived Korean war - The Guardian
The wild reason Ben Griffin still hasn’t driven the Land Rover he won at Colonial last year - Golf Digest
Munisar replaces Brathwaite as West Indies name T20 World Cup squad - ESPN
